title: Liability for debts
doc_html:
§508.  Liability for debts

No lands acquired under the provisions of this Part shall ever become liable for the satisfaction of any debt contracted prior to issuance of patent therefor.
doc_text:
§508.  Liability for debts
No lands acquired under the provisions of this Part shall ever become liable for the satisfaction of any debt contracted prior to issuance of patent therefor.
